long_desc: The Greater Demon Specter floats just above the ground before you.
detailed_desc:
The Greater Demon Specter, floats about a foot above the ground, its form
fading in and out of existance, changing colours. The only defining feature is
its glowing orange and red eyes. It continues to change form, its essence
forming claws, teeth, talons and tenticles, all of ghostly form, yet very real.
